race.comment: COCOON GIRL (6) is still a maiden after 14 starts. Managed to fill a minor placing at Roebourne two starts back before finishing eighth over 1300m at this track last time. Finds a nice race and gets the chance to break through. MINOZZA (3) is yet to break through in four runs. Finished fifth at his last appearance over 1300m at this track on June 20. Well placed on this occasion and gets his chance to break the ice. WATERSHED WISDOM (7) drifted well back last start before winding up strongly to finish third, beaten 4.5 lengths, over 1200m at Marble Bar. Expected to feature again. TAKE THE FIELD (1) progressed nicely last time out to finish just 1.5 lengths from the winner in second over 1300m at this track. Finds a suitable race and can build on that solid recent effort. MARITIME DREAM (8) is third-up here and creates plenty of interest out in distance.
